title: Ominous Offerings
description: An Ominous Mod featuring pillagers. Venture into deep dungeons and craft soul weaponry! And even a boss to find and kill!
body:
## Welcome to the Nightmare! Fellow Adventurer!!

Ominous Offerings is a Exploration and Equipment mod. To start your pillagery adventure. Find a Ominous Dungeon underground in Cave biomes. Beward though, you'd want to have Full Diamond at least, Netherite to be safe!

Fight your way through one of the dungeons to get impeccable loot! Such as Fully enchanted diamonds, Crossbows, iron, gold, among other ores. Spiritin, souls, and soullead! 

Spiritin and soullead can be used as a Late Game material to craft a VARIETY of new utilites! such as the Fabled, Ominous Advanced spawner! 

## The Ominous Advanced Spawner!
- The advanced spawner can be crafted with spiritin ingots, soullead bars, and a soul! place it down to get started!
- After its been placed, craft a bound soul of a specific mob the mod offers! such as a zombie or skeleton (and more!) 
- Right click the spawner with the bound soul to bind the spawner. You'll need spiritin dust to power it (found from crafting and in dungeons) as it spawns it'll consume the dust!
**
Useless you may ask? **do not fear, this spawner has NO spawn cap! ![The Ominous Advanced Spawner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e806bd274385b6f623b37421d0e660fb588e153.png)

Other tidbits. To pull a soul out of a spawner, right click with a Spiritin Scythe! the scythe can also be used to siphon souls off stronger mobs. as a Renewable source to get them!

## The Boss, The Ominous Golem!
- In one of the dungeons, you'll find a suspicious statue. Right click it with an Enchanted Omen core to summon the boss! On kill he'll drop an Omen core, A soul, A omen key, and a variety of materials!

The Omen key can be used to unlock secret rooms that are blocked off with Trapped Copper! It'll start to break, so repair it with a unbound soul in your offhand!

The Omen Core can be used for 4 uses. A Spiritin Sword, which summons explosive souls on strike, A spiritin Shield, that will buff you up when your blocking. A Spiritin Stormer Crossbow that fires a barrage of flames. And a Replica Statue for you to use as a trophy![The Ominous Golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5344df085d2ba5439838d64d795b77b79d889c1.png)

Theres more to find adventurer, but thats just the basics!
